nasb.text: He said to Jeroboam, “Take for yourself ten pieces; for thus says the Lord, the God of Israel, ‘Behold, I will tear the kingdom out of the hand of Solomon and give you ten tribes

esv.text: And he said to Jeroboam, “Take for yourself ten pieces, for thus says the Lord, the God of Israel, ‘Behold, I am about to tear the kingdom from the hand of Solomon and will give you ten tribes

cnv.text: 對耶羅波安說：“你拿十片去吧！因為耶和華以色列的　神這樣說：‘看哪，我必從所羅門的手裡把國奪去，把十個支派賜給你。

ccb.text: 对耶罗波安说：“你可以拿十片。以色列的上帝耶和华说，‘我必夺走所罗门的国，把十个支派赐给你。
